title: Senior Sales Engineer - AI/ML Advanced Data Architecture - HealthTech
company_focus:
Healthcare data analytics platform for life sciences and
healthcare
description:
We Breathe Life Into Data

At Komodo Health, our mission is to reduce the global burden
of disease. And we believe that smarter use of data is
essential to this mission. That’s why we built the
Healthcare Map — the industry’s largest, most complete,
precise view of the U.S. healthcare system — by combining
de-identified, real-world patient data with innovative
algorithms and decades of clinical experience. The
Healthcare Map serves as our foundation for a powerful suite
of software applications, helping us answer healthcare’s
most complex questions for our partners. Across the
healthcare ecosystem, we’re helping our clients unlock
critical insights to track detailed patient behaviors and
treatment patterns, identify gaps in care, address unmet
patient needs, and reduce the global burden of disease.

As we pursue these goals, it remains essential to us that we
stay grounded in our values: be awesome, seek growth,
deliver “wow,” and enjoy the ride. At Komodo, you will be
joining a team of ambitious, supportive Dragons with diverse
backgrounds but a shared passion to deliver on our mission
to reduce the burden of disease — and enjoy the journey
along the way.

The Opportunity at Komodo Health

The Sales Engineering team at Komodo Health partners closely
with our Sales and Account teams to provide best-in-class
technical expertise. We serve our Life Sciences and
Healthcare customers and partners, who rely on our advanced
data, software, and services to solve complex challenges. As
a critical bridge between our technology and our clients'
strategic goals, we accelerate growth and ensure our
solutions are effective at an enterprise level. We don't
just sell products; we architect the future of healthcare
and are instrumental in our mission to reduce the global
burden of disease.

The Senior Sales Engineer (AI/ML) is a technical leadership
position, driving our most complex and strategic technical
engagements. You'll act as the definitive subject matter
expert, guiding both internal teams and high-profile clients
in architecting cutting-edge solutions that leverage
advanced data, machine learning, and AI. This role directly
influences key revenue outcomes by championing technical
innovation and best practices. Your expertise will be key to
unlocking new use cases for our data and pushing the
boundaries of what is possible in healthcare analytics. Your
expertise will be key to unlocking new use cases for our
data and pushing the boundaries of what is possible in
healthcare analytics.

Mission

The Sales Engineer is a highly customer-facing and
technically adept partner who translates complex healthcare
data into strategic insights for our clients. You will own
the technical and data-focused aspects of the sales cycle,
from discovery to solution design and stakeholder
management. Your primary purpose is to help clients
understand the value of our platform and how it can be
integrated into their existing workflows to unlock new
insights and accelerate growth.

Looking back on your first 12 months at Komodo Health, you
will have...

- Served as a technical lead on multiple strategic
  opportunities, directly influencing the deal cycles and
  accelerating revenue growth. Your expert solution design
  and deep technical guidance will have been critical in
  securing high-value enterprise accounts.
- Become the definitive subject matter expert on Komodo's
  comprehensive suite of healthcare data assets and platform
  capabilities. You will have actively contributed to
  product feedback and shaped our long-term roadmap by
  bringing a deep understanding of client needs and market
  trends.
- Developed scalable technical frameworks, demo environments,
  and reusable assets that have set new organizational
  standards. Your work will have significantly boosted the
  efficiency and impact of the entire Sales Engineering
  team, enabling them to deliver more compelling and
  consistent client experiences.
- Driven cross-functional initiatives by partnering with
  Product, Data Science, and Engineering to deliver
  customized, innovative solutions. You will have
  successfully aligned Komodo's most advanced capabilities
  with the unique and complex needs of our top-tier
  pharmaceutical clients.
- Mentored peers and junior team members, elevating the
  technical skills and strategic mindset of the broader
  Sales Engineering organization. Your guidance will have
  fostered a culture of continuous learning and technical
  excellence, directly contributing to the team's overall
  success.

What you will bring to Komodo Health (required)

- 5+ years of progressive experience in Sales Engineering,
  Solutions Architecture, or a deeply technical client-
  facing role, with a significant focus on healthcare
  technology, data services, or advanced analytics.
- Demonstrated experience independently leading and owning the
  technical sales cycle for complex, enterprise-level
  opportunities, including technical discovery,
  qualification, and solution architecture with multi-
  million dollar contracts.
- Deep, authoritative expertise in healthcare claims data
  (e.g., 837/835 data, NDC codes, procedure codes, claims
  lifecycle, advanced analytics applications) and
  sophisticated life sciences commercial strategies.
- Exceptional technical proficiency, including advanced
  experience with APIs, complex data integration patterns,
  cloud-based architectures (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP), and
  data warehousing technologies like Snowflake.
- Proven ability to articulate complex technical concepts,
  including AI and machine learning principles, to both
  highly technical and non-technical executive audiences.
  You must be able to translate technical features into
  clear business value and influence strategic decisions.
- Expert-level knowledge of HIPAA, GDPR, and other relevant
  healthcare data regulations, with practical experience in
  ensuring data privacy, governance, and compliance within
  technical solutions.
- Extensive experience with identity resolution, privacy-
  preserving linking technologies, and advanced data de-
  identification methods.
- Strong sales acumen and situational awareness, with the
  ability to navigate complex organizational structures and
  build consensus among diverse stakeholders.
- Experience in designing and delivering bespoke technical
  demonstrations and proof-of-concepts (POCs) that showcase
  solution capabilities and directly address specific client
  pain points.
- A collaborative and consultative mindset, with the proven
  ability to partner effectively with sales, product, data
  science, and engineering teams to drive deal progression.

Additional skills and experience we’d prioritize (nice to
have)…

- Advanced certifications in cloud platforms (e.g., AWS
  Solutions Architect Professional, Azure Solutions
  Architect Expert) or specialized certifications in data
  engineering/analytics.
- HEOR/RWE
- Demonstrated experience in a leadership or mentorship
  capacity within a Sales Engineering or Solutions team.
- Familiarity with advanced CRM functionalities and sales
  enablement platforms beyond basic tracking, leveraging
  them for strategic insights and process optimization.
- A track record of contributing to industry thought
  leadership, such as presenting at conferences or
  publishing technical articles.



#LI-Remote

The pay range for each job posting reflects a minimum and
maximum range of annual base pay that we reasonably expect
to pay for this position within the US. We carefully
consider multiple business-related factors when determining
compensation, including job-related skills, work experience,
geographic work location, relevant training and
certifications, business needs and market demands.

The starting annual base pay for this role is listed below.
This position is also eligible for commissions in accordance
with a written agreement or plan. This role may also be
eligible for equity awards. In addition, this role is
eligible for benefits including, but not limited to,
comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance; flexible
time off and holidays; 401(k) with company match; disability
insurance and life insurance; and leaves of absence in
accordance with applicable state and local laws and
regulations and company policy.

San Francisco Bay Area and New York City:

$151,000—$208,000 USD

All Other US Locations:

$133,000—$181,000 USD

Komodo's AI Standard

At Komodo, we're not just witnessing the AI revolution –
we're leading it. This is a pivotal moment in time, where
being first to market with AI transforms industries and sets
the bar. We've already established industry leadership in
leveraging AI to revolutionize healthcare, and we expect
every team member to contribute. AI here isn't optional;
it's foundational. We expect you to integrate AI into your
daily work – from summarizing documents to automating
workflows and uncovering insights. This isn't just about
efficiency; it's about making every moment more meaningful,
building on trust in AI, and driving our collective success.

Join us in shaping the future of healthcare intelligence.
Where You’ll Work

Komodo Health has a hybrid work model; we recognize the
power of choice and importance of flexibility for the well-
being of both our company and our individual Dragons. Roles
may be completely remote based anywhere in the country
listed, remote but based in a specific region, or local
(commuting distance) to one of our hubs in San Francisco,
New York City, or Chicago with remote work options.

What We Offer

Positions may be eligible for company benefits in accordance
with Company policy. We offer a competitive total rewards
package including medical, dental and vision coverage along
with a broad range of supplemental benefits including 401k
Retirement Plan, prepaid legal assistance, and more. We also
offer paid time off for vacation, sickness, holiday, and
bereavement. We are pleased to be able to provide 100%
company-paid life insurance and long-term disability
insurance. This information is intended to be a general
overview and may be modified by the Company due to business-
related factors.

Equal Opportunity Statement

Komodo Health provides equal employment opportunities to all
applicants and employees. We prohibit discrimination and
harassment of any type with regard to race, color, religion,
age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics,
protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender
identity or expression, or any other characteristic
protected by federal, state, or local laws.

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you
have read and understand Komodo Health’s Privacy Notice for
Employees and Contractors.

This notice explains how we collect, use, and retain
applicant data.
responsibilities: Lead technical sales cycles for complex enterprise opportunities including discovery, qualification, and solution architecture
Serve as subject matter expert on Komodo's healthcare data assets and platform capabilities, translating technical features into business value
Architect cutting-edge solutions leveraging advanced data, machine learning, and AI for Life Sciences and Healthcare customers
Design and deliver bespoke technical demonstrations and proof-of-concepts that showcase solution capabilities
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Data Science, and Engineering teams to deliver customized innovative solutions
Mentor peers and junior team members, elevating technical skills and strategic mindset across the Sales Engineering organization
use_cases: Track detailed patient behaviors and treatment patterns using real-world healthcare data
Identify gaps in care and address unmet patient needs through advanced analytics
Support life sciences commercial strategies and HEOR/RWE (Health Economics and Outcomes Research/Real World Evidence) studies
Enable pharmaceutical companies to unlock critical insights from healthcare claims data and de-identified patient records
Deliver AI-powered healthcare analytics for tracking disease burden and treatment outcomes
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Sales Engineer role focused on selling and
architecting solutions using Komodo's AI/ML platform, not
building or deploying models. The responsibilities involve
technical sales, solution design, and client-facing
activities around healthcare data and analytics - supporting
AI work rather than doing it.
